original_image_tags: Color advertisement for King Blended Whisky by Brown-Forman. Shows a man sitting in an armchair holding a highball glass, a bottle of King whisky, and a highball glass with ice and a cherry. Text reads "Looks Lighter! Tastes Lighter!" and "Today's KING is Really LIGHT!".

Color illustration for Greyhound bus travel. Shows several groups of people in a stylized bus or waiting area: a honeymoon couple, a businessman, a housewife sightseeing, and a college student. A small inset shows a bus with the text "Parked with Parking? Take a Greyhound!". The main headline reads "Relax - as you See - as you Save by Greyhound!".

elements.description: Color photograph of a glass containing a mixed drink with ice and an orange peel garnish, positioned next to a text block reading 'Looks Lighter! Tastes Lighter!'.
Color photograph of a King Blended Whisky bottle with a brown label, positioned next to the text 'Today's KING is Really LIGHT!'.
Line sketch of a Greyhound bus interior showing passengers seated in rows, with handwritten-style captions pointing to specific passengers describing their trips.
Small line sketch of a Greyhound bus with the caption 'Peeved with Parking? Take a Greyhound!'.

judge.reason: Description B misquotes the Greyhound caption as 'Peeved with Parking?' while Description A quotes it as 'Parked with Parking?', and it describes the main bus visual as a 'line sketch of a bus interior' rather than the stylized illustration of people in a waiting area described by A.
